_comment: Maps eventhorizon.card_catalog.set_name -> PSA pop heading. PSA set slugs are NOT derivable from the catalog name (e.g. 'Base Set' -> 'pokemon-game', 'Team Rocket' -> 'pokemon-rocket'), so this mapping is curated by hand from the PSA /pop/ taxonomy. categoryID 156940 = TCG Cards (constant). headingID is the PSA set id used by POST /Pop/GetSetItems. 'verify:true' marks mappings that still need a human eyeball.
